case_title: EXECUTIVE FINANCIAL ENTERPRISES, INC. VS. PARK H. YOUNG et al

docket_entries.description: CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF JUN-15-2012 CONTINUED TO NOV-14-2012 AT 2:00 PM IN DEPARTMENT 610. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF EXECUTIVE FINANCIAL ENTERPRISES, INC. SERVED FEB-24-2012, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT YOUNG, PARK H.
RECEIVED REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF EXECUTIVE FINANCIAL ENTERPRISES, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT YOUNG, PARK H.

PROOF OF SERVICE OF REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT AND CLERK'S JUDGMENT; REQUEST FOR DISMISSAL; DECLARATION OF JOHN D. GUERRINI IN SUPPORT OF CLERK'S JUDGMENT RE: CALCULATION OF JUDGMENT, INCLUDING INTEREST AND WAIVER OF ATTORNEY'S FEES; {PROPOSED} JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF EXECUTIVE FINANCIAL ENTERPRISES, INC. SERVED APR-16-2012, MAIL AS TO DEFENDANT YOUNG, PARK H.
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $440.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT YOUNG, PARK H.
DECLARATION OF JOHN D. GUERRINI IN SUPPORT OF CLERK'S JUDGMENT RE; CALCULATION OF JUDGMENT, INCLUDING INTEREST AND WAIVER OF ATTORNEY'S FEES FILED BY PLAINTIFF EXECUTIVE FINANCIAL ENTERPRISES, INC.

COMMON COUNTS/OPEN BOOK ACCOUNT/COLLECTIONS, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF EXECUTIVE FINANCIAL ENTERPRISES, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT YOUNG, PARK H. DOES 1 THRU 100, INCL. SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR JUN-15-2012 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  APR-16-2012 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         MAY-31-2012
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 THRU 100, INCL.

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF EXECUTIVE FINANCIAL ENTERPRISES, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT YOUNG, PARK H. $24,336.11 PRINCIPAL, $9,884.94 INTEREST, $440.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $34,661.05, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF NOV-14-2012 IS OFF CALENDAR, JUDGMENT ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
